title: habenaria periyarensis
intro: Habenaria periyarensis, also known as the Periyar's Habenaria, is a species of orchid native to the Western Ghats of India. It is an epiphytic orchid with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant is known for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat infections and reduce pain. Herbal preparations of Habenaria periyarensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health complaints.
